title: Shrimp and Norwegian Salmon Penne
description: A spicy Italian-inspired dish combining shrimp, salmon, and penne pasta in a steamy tomato sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook penne pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes until pink, then remove from skillet and set aside.
Add Norwegian salmon fillet to skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Remove salmon from skillet and set aside with shrimp.
Add diced tomatoes, Italian seasoning, and red pepper flakes to skillet, stirring to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer sauce for 5 minutes.
Add cooked penne pasta to skillet and toss with sauce until well coated.
Return shrimp and salmon to skillet and stir to combine with pasta and sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with parsley if desired.
